name: github_create_user_copilot_space_resource
description: Create a resource for a user Copilot Space (POST /users/{username}/copilot-spaces/{space_number}/resources). Requires resource_type and metadata. Returns HTTP 201 or 200 for duplicate github_file. See [Create a resource for a Copilot Space for a user](https://docs.github.com/en/rest/copilot-spaces/r
